hits.title: 2024 Swimming Results | Rankings, Records and Results

hits.summary:
Charlie Hutchison put up a big personal best in the men’s 400m IM to become the 7th-fastest British performer in history.
...
Eva Okaro turned in a monster personal best of 24.05 to become Great Britain’s 4th-best SCM 50 free performer in history.
#### 2024 Swim England Nats: Morgan Hits 100 Breast British Junior Record, Colbert Wins 200 IM
Olympian Freya Colbert topped the women’s 200m IM in a new personal best on day one of the 2024 Swim England Winter National Championships.
hits.title: 2024 Swim England National Winter Championships
